meta.finalAnswer:

So, whether the task named **“Anfrage fü rFormular”** is always reachable from the initial node cannot be verified from the data available in this model.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?name ?type ?choreo WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model ;
         tai:normalizedId "1f1b01e0a85340689b6df314b32bb4b6" ;
         tai:belongsTo ?org .

  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography ;
          tai:belongsTo ?model .

  ?elem tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?elem bbo:name ?name .

  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("anfrage")))
  ?elem a ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.message: Even searching all named elements (any rdf:type) for a name containing 'Anfrage' in the given model returned no results. request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model ;
         tai:originalId "1f1b01e0a85340689b6df314b32bb4b6" ;
         tai:belongsTo ?org .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?elem tai:belongsTo ?choreo .

  ?elem bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(STRLEN(STR(?name)) > 0)
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("formular")))
  ?elem a ?type .
}
LIMIT 25
